focus: Native-Speed Shadowing at Full Complexity — Blueprint Phase 5 (Advanced)
focus_ar: المحاكاة بالسرعة الطبيعية في أعقد مستوى — المرحلة الخامسة المتقدمة من الخطة
arabic_challenge: L2 Week 11 trained you in Blueprint Phase 3/4 shadowing and transcription. This week advances to Phase 5 — per §5.5, shadowing WITHOUT text, matching emotion/speed/tone, using genuinely advanced sources (stand-up comedy, unscripted interviews, fast dialogue). This week's Advanced Pronunciation theme makes this the natural home for the blueprint's most demanding shadowing tier.

target_sounds: shadowing without text: matching rhythm from audio alone

isolation.instructions: Choose a 20-30 second clip of natural native speech. Listen 2-3 times WITHOUT any transcript, then shadow it purely by ear, matching rhythm and pace as closely as possible.
isolation.instructions_ar: اختار مقطع صوتي طبيعي ٢٠-٣٠ ثانية. استمع ٢-٣ مرات بدون أي نص مكتوب، وبعدين حاكيه بالسمع فقط، وطابق الإيقاع والسرعة بأقرب شكل ممكن.
practice: Find a short clip of unscripted native speech (interview, vlog, podcast). Shadow it by ear only, no text.

sentence_practice: (No fixed sentences — uses your own chosen audio clip.)
daily_drills.record_this: (Shadow a 20-30 second unscripted native clip by ear only, no transcript.)
daily_drills.self_check: Without the crutch of text, how closely did your shadowed rhythm match the original?

isolation.instructions: Choose a clip with clear emotional content (excitement, frustration, humor) and shadow not just the sounds, but the emotional coloring of the delivery.
isolation.instructions_ar: اختار مقطع فيه محتوى عاطفي واضح (حماس، إحباط، فكاهة) وحاكي مش بس الأصوات، لكن التلوين العاطفي للأداء.
practice: Find a clip with clear emotion (a comedian, an excited reaction video, a passionate interview). Shadow the emotion, not just the words.

pair: shadowing that captures the emotional tone

sentence_practice: (No fixed sentences — uses your own chosen audio clip.)
daily_drills.record_this: (Shadow an emotionally expressive native clip, matching the emotional tone as well as the sounds.)
daily_drills.self_check: Did your shadowed version capture the FEELING of the original, not just the correct sounds?

target_sounds: shadowing fast, dense native dialogue (comedy/banter style)

isolation.instructions: Choose a clip of fast, overlapping, or dense native dialogue (sitcom banter, comedy podcast) — this week's Humor & Sarcasm-adjacent theme makes this especially relevant.
isolation.instructions_ar: اختار مقطع حوار طبيعي سريع ومكثف (مسلسل كوميدي، بودكاست فكاهي) — موضوع الفكاهة هذا الأسبوع بيخلي ده مهم بشكل خاص.
practice: Find a fast comedic dialogue clip. Shadow it at full speed, even if imperfect at first.

pair: shadowing fast dialogue at genuine speed

sentence_practice: (No fixed sentences — uses your own chosen audio clip.)
daily_drills.record_this: (Shadow a fast, comedic native dialogue clip at full original speed.)
daily_drills.self_check: Did you resist the urge to secretly slow down, keeping pace with the genuinely fast original?

target_sounds: repeated shadowing for progressive refinement (Blueprint 'shadow 5x' best practice)

isolation.instructions: Per Blueprint §5.5's best practices, shadow the SAME 30-60 second clip 5 times, recording only the 5th attempt — notice how much closer to the original your 5th attempt sounds compared to your 1st.
isolation.instructions_ar: بحسب أفضل ممارسات §٥.٥ من الخطة، حاكي نفس المقطع ٣٠-٦٠ ثانية ٥ مرات، وسجل بس المحاولة الخامسة — لاحظ قد إيه محاولتك الخامسة أقرب للأصل من الأولى.
practice: Choose one clip. Shadow it 5 full times without recording, then record attempt #5.

sentence_practice: (No fixed sentences — uses your own chosen audio clip.)
daily_drills.record_this: (Record your 5th shadowing attempt of a chosen clip, after 4 unrecorded practice rounds.)
daily_drills.self_check: If you could compare attempt 1 to attempt 5, would the improvement be clearly audible?

target_sounds: full Phase 5 shadowing: no text, matching emotion + speed + tone together

isolation.instructions: Combine everything from this week: choose a fast, emotionally expressive, unscripted clip and shadow it without text, matching emotion, speed, and tone simultaneously — the complete Blueprint Phase 5 standard.
isolation.instructions_ar: دمج كل حاجة من هذا الأسبوع: اختار مقطع سريع ومعبّر عاطفيًا وغير مكتوب، وحاكيه بدون نص، بمطابقة العاطفة والسرعة والنبرة كلهم مع بعض.
practice: Choose your most challenging clip yet (fast, emotional, unscripted) and attempt full Phase 5 shadowing.

pair: partial shadowing, missing emotion or speed

sentence_practice: (No fixed sentences — uses your own chosen audio clip.)
daily_drills.record_this: (Attempt full Phase 5 shadowing — no text, matching emotion, speed, and tone — on your most challenging clip yet.)
daily_drills.self_check: How close did you get to the full standard: text-free, emotionally accurate, at genuine native speed?

daily_drills.target_sounds: Review: text-free shadowing, emotional matching, fast dialogue, repeated refinement, full Phase 5 combination

isolation.instructions: Revisit your favorite or most successful clip from Days 1-5 and attempt one final, best-effort shadowing pass.
isolation.instructions_ar: راجع المقطع المفضل أو الأنجح من الأيام ١-٥ وحاول تمرير محاكاة أخيرة بأفضل مجهود.
practice: Choose your best clip from this week and shadow it one final time, applying everything learned.

sentence_practice: (No fixed sentences — uses your own chosen audio clip.)
daily_drills.record_this: (Final review shadowing pass on your best/favorite clip from this week.)
daily_drills.self_check: Comparing this to your Day 1 attempt, is there a clear, audible improvement in naturalness and accuracy?

test_yourself.instructions: Select a genuinely new, unfamiliar, fast, emotionally-expressive native clip and attempt full Phase 5 shadowing (no text, matching emotion/speed/tone) as your final checkpoint for this skill.
test_yourself.passage: (Choose a new, unfamiliar native-speed audio clip — ideally comedic or emotionally expressive, 20-40 seconds. Shadow it fully, without text.)

sounds_to_check.text-free accuracy: check how closely rhythm and words match without reading
sounds_to_check.emotional matching: check if tone/emotion is captured, not just sounds
sounds_to_check.speed matching: check if pace matches the original without artificial slowing

scoring_guide.90_100: Full Phase 5 standard achieved on unfamiliar material — text-free, emotionally accurate, at genuine native speed.
scoring_guide.70_89: Strong shadowing with minor gaps in emotional nuance or occasional speed compensation.
scoring_guide.50_69: Rhythm/words mostly correct but emotional tone or speed noticeably different from source.
scoring_guide.below_50: Return to L2 Week 11's Phase 3/4 (text-supported) shadowing for further foundational practice before attempting Phase 5 again.

for_arabic_speakers: This week implements Blueprint §5.5's Phase 5 — the final, most demanding shadowing tier, explicitly described as 'shadow without text, matching emotion/tone' using sources like stand-up comedy and fast dialogue.

Choosing your own clips (rather than pre-selected drill sentences) is intentional at this level — real-world listening comprehension and mimicry skill must transfer to material you've never specifically prepared for.
This is one of the last purely mechanical/technical accent skills in the curriculum — Week 8 shifts to a comprehensive, integrative final review.
supplementary_notes.daily_time: 25-30 minutes this week (includes finding/preparing audio clips daily)
supplementary_notes.recording_requirement: Record Day 5, Day 6, and Day 7 — keep all three as evidence of your advanced shadowing capability, useful for L3 mentorship activities where you may guide other students through this same process.
